version_description: Riptide by Vance Joy. Link for song- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uJ_1HMAGb4k .
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Riptide: Vance Joy
Chords arranged by: S201070110

Chords you must know

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

* = (hold for 4 seconds)

[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] (2x)

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I was scared of dentists and the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I was scared of pretty girls and starting conversations[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, all my friends are turning green[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
You're the magician's assistant in their dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
uhoo oooo  oooo,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
uhoo  oo,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]*
and they come unstuck[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I got a lump in my throat cause[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
You're gonna sing the words wrong[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
